name: My Huckleberry Friends
overview: Yu Zhouzhou, a math prodigy, defies her teachers and family's expectations and elects to study liberal arts. Though the transition from math & science to liberal arts major is difficult, she found joy in the new challenges, as well as making new friends and reconnecting with old ones.

trailers.title: 【DRAMA SERIES】MY HUCKLEBERRY FRIENDS 你好，旧时光 (iQIYI ORIGINAL)
